overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character traversing a snowy mountain landscape at night. The character walks from an open field under a bright full moon to a narrow cliffside path overlooking a frozen lake.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy mountain field with scattered pine trees

events.description: clouds part to reveal the full moon, increasing the illumination on the snow

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through deep snow wearing a straw cape and wide-brimmed hat, moving toward the moon

entered.detail: tall pine tree covered in snow on the left side of the field
tall pine tree covered in snow on the right side
bright full moon illuminating the snowy landscape
deep snow covering the ground with visible footprints
snow-covered mountain range visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide-open snowy field at night, flanked by scattered snow-covered pine trees. Initially overcast, the sky clears around 8 seconds to reveal a bright full moon that casts sharp shadows across the snow. The character moves steadily forward toward the distant mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching cliff edge with dense pine forest on the right

events.description: terrain drops away revealing a cliff edge with frozen water visible below

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through snow as the landscape slopes downward toward the cliff edge

entered.detail: steep cliff edge dropping down to the frozen water below
frozen lake or river visible at the bottom of the cliff

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the edge of a cliff, with dense snow-covered pines now lining the right side. Around 32 seconds, the ground falls away to reveal a frozen lake far below. The distant mountains pass out of view as the character nears the cliff edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cliffside path overlooking frozen water with snow-covered rocks

events.description: character turns slightly left to follow the contour of the cliff edge along the water

agents.ego_description: walking carefully along the narrow cliff path, looking down at the frozen lake below

entered.detail: snow-covered rocky outcrops along the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: The character navigates a narrow path along the cliff edge, with the frozen lake now clearly visible to the left. Snow-covered rocks line the cliffside as the character follows the winding path. The pine trees recede into the distance on the right while the moon remains visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a wide, moonlit snowy expanse that gradually narrows into a precarious cliffside trail. It begins with the character traversing an open field of snow and scattered pine trees under an overcast sky, which soon clears to reveal a bright full moon casting sharp shadows across the terrain. As the character moves forward, the open landscape shifts toward a dense cluster of snow-covered pines that lead directly to the edge of a steep precipice. The scene then opens up to reveal a frozen lake far below as the distant mountains vanish from view, shifting the focus to the dramatic drop. Finally, the camera follows the character along a winding, narrow path lined with snow-covered rocks, keeping the frozen lake in sight to the left while the moon remains visible ahead.
